## Meeting Purpose

[Explore AI-powered lead qualification automation for Rapyd's inbound leads and discuss potential collaboration with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Rapyd seeks to automate complex lead qualification process, currently manual and time-intensive](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Goal: Efficiently identify quality leads from large inbound volume before human SDR involvement](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Two-phase approach: V1 focuses on lead scoring/filtering; V2 aims for personalized content generation](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [GrowthX to review qualification criteria and propose AI-driven solution leveraging their expertise](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)

## Topics

### Current Lead Qualification Process

  - [Manual, multi-step process including:](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
      - [Basic criteria: country, currency, business duration, revenue](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
      - [Detailed verification: website authenticity, social media presence, company/individual legitimacy](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
      - [Compliance checks: anti-money laundering, sanctions screening](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Process is time-consuming, often eliminating 80% of leads before deeper evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)

### Automation Goals

  - [Streamline initial qualification to identify promising leads quickly](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [Reduce human involvement in early stages of lead assessment](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Potentially integrate with HubSpot for seamless workflow](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Future vision: Customize outreach (emails, landing pages) based on qualified lead data](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### GrowthX's Potential Role

  - [Leverage AI expertise to design end-to-end automated workflow](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [Adapt blog content generation skills to lead qualification and personalized outreach](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Collaborate on process re-engineering using AI, similar to Rapyd's compliance automation success](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)

### Project Phases

1.  V1 (Initial Focus):
    
      - [Develop AI-driven lead scoring system](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
      - [Identify qualified leads worth human follow-up](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
      - [Provide coherent analysis of large lead volumes](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)

2.  V2 (Future Expansion):
    
      - [HubSpot integration](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
      - [Personalized content generation (emails, landing pages) for ICPs](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
      - [Automated sales team preparation with targeted talking points](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Linear qualification process with yes/no criteria (no complex weighting system)](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Potential for nuanced interpretation of subjective criteria (e.g., website professionalism)](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [Opportunity to flag unclear information for human review](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to review qualification criteria shared by Mark](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [Mara to discuss project with GrowthX engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop initial thoughts/proposal for Rapyd's consideration](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [Potential follow-up with Yana Pearson (Global Demand Gen) or Mikael (Marketing Ops) for additional insights](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Schedule separate meeting to discuss GrowthX's initial proposal](https://fathom.video/share/sKjSXwNx3pR8mbstRePJLKjekxoHVEby?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
